---
title: "Service"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

This page is under construction.

For a full list of service activities, see my CV.

# Professional Communities

-   Mathematical Association of America (MAA) Membership Committee, member 2023-29 and chair 2026-29

-   American Meteorological Society (AMS) Committee on Middle Atmosphere, member 2025-28

# University and Departmental Service
